eas_text: A civil authority has issued A LOCAL AREA EMERGENCY for the following counties or areas: Worth, MO; at 5:23 AM on JUN 11, 2026 Effective until 6:23 AM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: SEVERE THUNDERSTORM WARNING. Storms incoming from the NW expect strong winds, heavy rains and hail. Flash flooding may occur with these storms. Worth County remains in a FLOOD WATCH.
